form.label: DNS Queries
form.description: Detailed view of DNS queries processed by Pi-Hole

choice.value: ("gravity blocked" OR "exactly denied" OR "special domain" OR "Apple iCloud Private Relay" OR "Designated Resolver" OR "is 0.0.0.0")

search.query: `pihole_base` $action_filter$ domain=$domain_filter$ client_ip=$client_filter$ | eval action=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|special domain|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::$"), "blocked", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "rate_limited", match(_raw, "forwarded"), "forwarded", match(_raw, "cached-stale"), "cached_stale", match(_raw, "cached"), "cached", match(_raw, "reply"), "reply", match(_raw, "/etc/hosts"), "local_lookup", match(_raw, "query\["), "query", 1=1, "other" ) | stats count as "Total Events", dc(domain) as "Unique Domains", dc(client_ip) as "Unique Clients", dc(query_type) as "Query Types"
`pihole_base` $action_filter$ domain=$domain_filter$ client_ip=$client_filter$ query_type=* | stats count by query_type | sort -count
`pihole_base` $action_filter$ domain=$domain_filter$ client_ip=$client_filter$ client_ip=* | stats count by client_ip | sort -count | head 10

`pihole_base` $action_filter$ domain=$domain_filter$ client_ip=$client_filter$ | eval action=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|special domain|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::$"), "blocked", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "rate_limited", match(_raw, "forwarded"), "forwarded", match(_raw, "cached-stale"), "cached_stale", match(_raw, "cached"), "cached", match(_raw, "reply"), "reply", match(_raw, "/etc/hosts"), "local_lookup", match(_raw, "query\["), "query", 1=1, "other" ) | table _time, action, query_type, domain, client_ip, ip_address, upstream_ip | sort -_time | head 100

`pihole_base` $action_filter$ domain=$domain_filter$ client_ip=$client_filter$ domain=* | eval action=case( match(_raw, "gravity blocked|exactly denied|Apple iCloud Private Relay|Designated Resolver|special domain|is 0\.0\.0\.0|is ::$"), "blocked", match(_raw, "Rate-limiting"), "rate_limited", match(_raw, "forwarded"), "forwarded", match(_raw, "cached-stale"), "cached_stale", match(_raw, "cached"), "cached", match(_raw, "reply"), "reply", match(_raw, "/etc/hosts"), "local_lookup", match(_raw, "query\["), "query", 1=1, "other" ) | stats count as "Event Count", dc(client_ip) as "Unique Clients", values(action) as "Actions" by domain | sort -"Event Count" | head 50

div.p: xPi-Hole for Splunk | Copyright 2024-2025 xTechnix Inc. | All Rights Reserved
